children.heading: Accredited agency
children.label: 1 Accredited agency
children.text: The term “accredited agency” means an agency accredited under subchapter II to provide adoption services in the United States in cases subject to the Convention.

children.heading: Accrediting entity
children.label: 2 Accrediting entity
children.text: The term “accrediting entity” means an entity designated under to accredit agencies and approve persons under subchapter II.section 14922(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: identifying a child for adoption and arranging an adoption;

children.label: B
children.text: securing necessary consent to termination of parental rights and to adoption;

children.label: C
children.text: performing a background study on a child or a home study on a prospective adoptive parent, and reporting on such a study;

children.label: D
children.text: making determinations of the best interests of a child and the appropriateness of adoptive placement for the child;

children.label: E
children.text: post-placement monitoring of a case until final adoption; and

children.label: F
children.text: where made necessary by disruption before final adoption, assuming custody and providing child care or any other social service pending an alternative placement.

children.heading: Agency
children.label: 4 Agency
children.text: The term “agency” means any person other than an individual.

children.heading: Approved person
children.label: 5 Approved person
children.text: The term “approved person” means a person approved under subchapter II to provide adoption services in the United States in cases subject to the Convention.

children.heading: Attorney General
children.label: 6 Attorney General
children.text: Except as used in , the term “Attorney General” means the Attorney General, acting through the Commissioner of Immigration and Naturalization.section 14944 of this title

children.heading: Central authority
children.label: 7 Central authority
children.text: The term “central authority” means the entity designated as such by any Convention country under Article 6(1) of the Convention.

children.heading: Central authority function
children.label: 8 Central authority function
children.text: The term “central authority function” means any duty required to be carried out by a central authority under the Convention.

children.heading: Convention
children.label: 9 Convention
children.text: The term “Convention” means the Convention on Protection of Children and Co-operation in Respect of Intercountry Adoption, done at The Hague on .May 29, 1993

children.heading: Convention adoption
children.label: 10 Convention adoption
children.text: The term “Convention adoption” means an adoption of a child resident in a foreign country party to the Convention by a United States citizen, or an adoption of a child resident in the United States by an individual residing in another Convention country.

children.heading: Convention record
children.label: 11 Convention record
children.text: The term “Convention record” means any item, collection, or grouping of information contained in an electronic or physical document, an electronic collection of data, a photograph, an audio or video tape, or any other information storage medium of any type whatever that contains information about a specific past, current, or prospective Convention adoption (regardless of whether the adoption was made final) that has been preserved in accordance with by the Secretary of State or the Attorney General.section 14941(a) of this title

children.heading: Convention country
children.label: 12 Convention country
children.text: The term “Convention country” means a country party to the Convention.

children.heading: Other Convention country
children.label: 13 Other Convention country
children.text: The term “other Convention country” means a Convention country other than the United States.

children.heading: Person
children.label: 14 Person
children.text: The term “person” shall have the meaning provided in and shall not include any agency of government or tribal government entity.section 1 of title 1

children.heading: Person with an ownership or control interest
children.label: 15 Person with an ownership or control interest
children.text: The term “person with an ownership or control interest” has the meaning given such term in .section 1320a–3(a)(3) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 16 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of State.

children.heading: State
children.label: 17 State
children.text: The term “State” means the 50 States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, Guam, and the Virgin Islands.
